title: acalypha manniana
intro: Acalypha manniana, also known as the Red Stinger or Cat's Tail, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Acalypha manniana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments.
